base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should improve no-0DTE fallback exposure efficiency and reduce stale breakout MAE/hold drag while leaving VALID_0DTE and 1DTE option-confirmed edges unchanged. Main tradeoff is losing or underpaying the tiny stale breakout sample; reject if fallback expectancy turns negative or total net profit retention falls below 98%.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_g_missing_0dte_policy_adapted, focused only on breakout_long_no_0dte. The current leader is strong overall, but STALE_0DTE fallback is low-efficiency and breakout_long_no_0dte is the worst stale fallback sleeve. This is not a global veto or option-profile change; it isolates stale/no-0DTE ES confirmation quality after prior broad pruning and extended-VWAP veto repair failed to improve score.
